        = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v₁, (0 : ℝ)) + fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v₂, (0 : ℝ))
          + fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by
      intro r t
      have hadd' :=
        (ContinuousLinearMap.map_add (fderiv ℝ F (r, t)) (v₁, (0 : ℝ)) (v₂, (0 : ℝ)))
      have hdecomp :
          (v₁ + v₂, (1 : ℝ)) = (v₁, (0 : ℝ)) + (v₂, (0 : ℝ)) + (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by
        ext <;> simp [add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm]
      calc
        fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v₁ + v₂, (1 : ℝ))
            = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) ((v₁, (0 : ℝ)) + (v₂, (0 : ℝ)) + (0, (1 : ℝ))) := by
                simpa [hdecomp]
        _ = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) ((v₁, (0 : ℝ)) + (v₂, (0 : ℝ))) +
              fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by
                simpa [ContinuousLinearMap.map_add, add_assoc]
        _ = (fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v₁, (0 : ℝ)) + fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v₂, (0 : ℝ))) +
              fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by
                simpa [hadd']
        _ = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v₁, (0 : ℝ)) + fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v₂, (0 : ℝ)) +
              fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by
                simp [add_assoc]
    have hind : ∀ r₁ r₂ t₁ t₂,
        fderiv ℝ F (r₁, t₁) (v₁, (0 : ℝ)) = fderiv ℝ F (r₂, t₂) (v₁, (0 : ℝ)) := by
      intro r₁ r₂ t₁ t₂
      have h1 := congrArg (fun z => z) (hF r₁ v₁ t₁)
      have h2 := congrArg (fun z => z) (hF r₂ v₁ t₂)
      have h0₁ := congrArg (fun z => z) (hF r₁ 0 t₁)
      have h0₂ := congrArg (fun z => z) (hF r₂ 0 t₂)
      have hv₁ : δL v₁ = fderiv ℝ F (r₁, t₁) (v₁, (1 : ℝ)) := by simpa using (hF r₁ v₁ t₁).symm
      have hv₂ : δL v₁ = fderiv ℝ F (r₂, t₂) (v₁, (1 : ℝ)) := by simpa using (hF r₂ v₁ t₂).symm
      have hzero₁ : 0 = fderiv ℝ F (r₁, t₁) (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by simpa [hδL0] using (hF r₁ 0 t₁)
      have hzero₂ : 0 = fderiv ℝ F (r₂, t₂) (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by simpa [hδL0] using (hF r₂ 0 t₂)
      have hsplit₁ :

        have hdecomp : (v₁, (1 : ℝ)) = (v₁, (0 : ℝ)) + (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by

            fderiv ℝ F (r₂, t₂) (v₁, (0 : ℝ)) + fderiv ℝ F (r₂, t₂) (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by
        have hdecomp : (v₁, (1 : ℝ)) = (v₁, (0 : ℝ)) + (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by
          ext <;> simp
        simpa [hdecomp, ContinuousLinearMap.map_add] using
          (rfl : fderiv ℝ F (r₂, t₂) (v₁, (1 : ℝ)) = fderiv ℝ F (r₂, t₂) (v₁, (1 : ℝ)))
      have : fderiv ℝ F (r₁, t₁) (v₁, (0 : ℝ)) = fderiv ℝ F (r₂, t₂) (v₁, (0 : ℝ)) := by
        have : fderiv ℝ F (r₁, t₁) (v₁, (1 : ℝ)) = fderiv ℝ F (r₂, t₂) (v₁, (1 : ℝ)) := by
          simpa [hv₁, hv₂]

        have : (fderiv ℝ F (r₁, t₁) (v₁, (0 : ℝ)) + fderiv ℝ F (r₁, t₁) (0, (1 : ℝ)))
            = (fderiv ℝ F (r₂, t₂) (v₁, (0 : ℝ)) + fderiv ℝ F (r₂, t₂) (0, (1 : ℝ))) := by
          simpa [hsplit₁, hsplit₂] using this
        have : fderiv ℝ F (r₁, t₁) (v₁, (0 : ℝ)) = fderiv ℝ F (r₂, t₂) (v₁, (0 : ℝ)) := by
          have hz1 : fderiv ℝ F (r₁, t₁) (0, (1 : ℝ)) = 0 := by
            have := h0 r₁ t₁; simpa using this
          have hz2 : fderiv ℝ F (r₂, t₂) (0, (1 : ℝ)) = 0 := by
            have := h0 r₂ t₂; simpa using this
          simpa [hz1, hz2] using this
        exact this
      exact this
    have hδLadd : δL (v₁ + v₂) = δL v₁ + δL v₂ := by
      have r : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) := 0
      have t : ℝ := 0
      have hv : δL (v₁ + v₂) = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v₁ + v₂, (1 : ℝ)) := by
        simpa using (hF r (v₁ + v₂) t).symm
      have hv1 : δL v₁ = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v₁, (1 : ℝ)) := by
        simpa using (hF r v₁ t).symm
      have hv2 : δL v₂ = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v₂, (1 : ℝ)) := by
        simpa using (hF r v₂ t).symm
      have hsplit :
          fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v₁ + v₂, (1 : ℝ)) =
            fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v₁, (1 : ℝ)) + fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v₂, (0 : ℝ)) := by
        have hdecomp : (v₁ + v₂, (1 : ℝ)) = (v₁, (1 : ℝ)) + (v₂, (0 : ℝ)) := by
          ext <;> simp [add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm]
        simpa [hdecomp, ContinuousLinearMap.map_add] using
          (rfl : fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v₁ + v₂, (1 : ℝ)) =
                fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v₁ + v₂, (1 : ℝ)))
      have hsplit2 :
          fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v₂, (1 : ℝ)) =
            fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v₂, (0 : ℝ)) + fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by
        have hdecomp : (v₂, (1 : ℝ)) = (v₂, (0 : ℝ)) + (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by
          ext <;> simp
        simpa [hdecomp, ContinuousLinearMap.map_add] using
          (rfl : fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v₂, (1 : ℝ)) = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v₂, (1 : ℝ)))
      have hz : fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (0, (1 : ℝ)) = 0 := by
        have := h0 r t; simpa using this
      have : fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v₂, (0 : ℝ)) = δL v₂ := by
        have : δL v₂ = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v₂, (1 : ℝ)) := by simpa using (hF r v₂ t).symm
        have : fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v₂, (1 : ℝ)) =
              fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v₂, (0 : ℝ)) + fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by
          exact hsplit2
        have : δL v₂ = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v₂, (0 : ℝ)) := by
          simpa [this, hz, add_zero] using congrArg (fun z => z) (Eq.trans this.symm this)
        simpa using this.symm
      calc
        δL (v₁ + v₂) = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v₁ + v₂, (1 : ℝ)) := hv
        _ = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v₁, (1 : ℝ)) + fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v₂, (0 : ℝ)) := hsplit
        _ = δL v₁ + δL v₂ := by simpa [hv1, this]
    exact hδLadd
  have hsmul : ∀ (a : ℝ) (v : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), δL (a • v) = a * δL v := by
    intro a v
    have r : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) := 0
    have t : ℝ := 0
    have hv : δL (a • v) = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (a • v, (1 : ℝ)) := by
      simpa using (hF r (a • v) t).symm
    have hv1 : δL v = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, (1 : ℝ)) := by
      simpa using (hF r v t).symm
    have hsplit :
        fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (a • v, (1 : ℝ)) =
          a • fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, (0 : ℝ)) + fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by
      have hdecomp : (a • v, (1 : ℝ)) = a • (v, (0 : ℝ)) + (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by
        ext <;> simp
      simpa [hdecomp, ContinuousLinearMap.map_add, ContinuousLinearMap.map_smul] using
        (rfl : fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (a • v, (1 : ℝ)) = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (a • v, (1 : ℝ)))
    have hz : fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (0, (1 : ℝ)) = 0 := by
      have := h0 r t; simpa using this
    have hv0 : fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, (0 : ℝ)) = δL v := by
      have hdecomp : (v, (1 : ℝ)) = (v, (0 : ℝ)) + (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by
        ext <;> simp
      have : fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, (1 : ℝ))
          = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, (0 : ℝ)) + fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by
        simpa [hdecomp, ContinuousLinearMap.map_add] using
          (rfl : fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, (1 : ℝ)) = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, (1 : ℝ)))
      have : δL v = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, (0 : ℝ)) := by
        simpa [hv1, this, hz, add_zero] using (rfl : δL v = δL v)
      simpa using this.symm
    calc
      δL (a • v) = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (a • v, (1 : ℝ)) := hv
      _ = a • fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, (0 : ℝ)) + fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (0, (1 : ℝ)) := hsplit
      _ = a • (δL v) + 0 := by simpa [hv0, hz]
      _ = a * δL v := by simp [smul_eq_mul, add_zero]
  have hlin : IsLinearMap ℝ δL := by
    refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
    · intro v₁ v₂; simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using hadd v₁ v₂
    · intro a v; simpa using hsmul a v
  classical
  let f : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) →ₗ[ℝ] ℝ :=
    (IsLinearMap.mk' δL ⟨hlin.1, hlin.2⟩)
  rcases (InnerProductSpace.exists_eq_inner (𝕜 := ℝ) (E := EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) f) with ⟨g, hg⟩
  refine ⟨g, ?_⟩
  intro v
  simpa [f, hg v]

classical
  rcases h with ⟨F, hFdiff, hF⟩
  have hδL_eq : ∀ v, δL v = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, 1) := by
    intro v
    simpa using (hF 0 v 0)
  have hadd : ∀ v w, δL (v + w) = δL v + δL w := by
    intro v w
    have hvw : δL (v + w) = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v + w, 1) := hδL_eq (v + w)
    have hv : δL v = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, 1) := hδL_eq v
    have hw : δL w = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (w, 1) := hδL_eq w
    have h0 : δL 0 = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (0, 1) := by
      simpa using (hδL_eq 0)
    have hlin : fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v + w, 1)
        = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, 1) + fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (w, 1)
          - fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (0, 1) := by
      calc
        fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v + w, 1)
            = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) ((v, 1) + (w, 1) - (0, (1 : ℝ))) := by
                simp [Prod.ext_iff]
        _ = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) ((v, 1) + (w, 1)) - fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by
                simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm]
                  using (map_sub (fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ))) ((v, 1) + (w, 1)) (0, (1 : ℝ)))
        _ = (fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, 1) + fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (w, 1))
              - fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by
                simp [map_add]
        _ = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, 1) + fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (w, 1)
              - fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (0, 1) := by
                simp
    have hconst : fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (0, 1) = 0 := by
      have : δL 0 = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (0, 1) := h0
      simpa [hδL0] using this.symm
    have : fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v + w, 1)
        = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, 1) + fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (w, 1) := by
      simpa [hconst] using hlin
    simpa [hvw, hv, hw] using this
  have hsmul : ∀ (a : ℝ) v, δL (a • v) = a * δL v := by
    intro a v
    have h1 : δL (a • v) = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (a • v, 1) := hδL_eq (a • v)
    have h2 : δL v = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, 1) := hδL_eq v
    have h0 : δL 0 = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (0, 1) := by
      simpa using (hδL_eq 0)
    have hconst : fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (0, 1) = 0 := by
      have : δL 0 = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (0, 1) := h0
      simpa [hδL0] using this.symm
    have : fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (a • v, 1)
        = a • fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, 1) + (1 - a) • fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (0, 1) := by
      calc
        fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (a • v, 1)
            = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (a • (v, 1) + (1 - a) • (0, (1 : ℝ))) := by
                simp [Prod.ext_iff, sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm, smul_add, add_smul]
        _ = a • fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, 1) + (1 - a) • fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by
                simp [map_add, map_smul]
    have : fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (a • v, 1) = a • fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, 1) := by
      simpa [hconst] using this
    have : δL (a • v) = a • (δL v) := by
      simpa [h1, h2] using congrArg id this
    simpa [smul_eq_mul] using this
  let φ : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) →ₗ[ℝ] ℝ :=
    { toFun := δL
      map_add' := hadd
      map_smul' := by
        intro a v
        simpa [smul_eq_mul] using (hsmul a v) }
  refine ⟨(InnerProductSpace.toDual ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n))).symm φ, ?_⟩
  intro v
  simpa using (by
    have := (InnerProductSpace.toDual ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n))).apply_symm_apply φ v
    simpa using this)

classical
  rcases h with ⟨F, hFdiff, hF⟩
  have hconst :
      ∀ (r : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) (t : ℝ),
        ∀ v, fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, 1) = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 1) := by
    intro r t v
    have := congrArg (fun (x : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) => δL v) (by rfl : r = r)
    -- use the defining equality for δL at (r,t) and at (0,0)
    simpa [hF r v t, hF 0 v 0]
  let L : (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) × ℝ) →L[ℝ] ℝ := fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)
  have hL0 : L (0, 1) = 0 := by
    have := hF 0 0 0
    have h' : δL (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) = L (0, 1) := by
      simpa [L] using this
    simpa [hδL0] using h'
  have hδL : ∀ v, δL v = L (v, 0) := by
    intro v
    have h00 : δL v = L (v, 1) := by
      have := hF 0 v 0
      simpa [L] using this
    have hsplit : L (v, 1) = L (v, 0) + L (0, 1) := by
      simpa [ContinuousLinearMap.map_add] using (congrArg (fun x => L x) (by simp))
    simpa [hsplit, hL0] using h00
  let g : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) := (L.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.inl ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) ℝ)).repr
  refine ⟨g, ?_⟩
  intro v
  -- identify the linear functional v ↦ L (v,0) with inner product against g
  have : L (v, 0) = ⟪g, v⟫_ℝ := by
    -- use Riesz representation via `ContinuousLinearMap.repr`
    simpa [g] using (ContinuousLinearMap.innerSL_apply (E := EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) (x := g) v).symm
  simpa [hδL v, this]

classical
  refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
  intro v
  have hv : v = 0 := by
    simpa using (Subsingleton.elim v 0)
  simpa [hv, hδL0]

classical
  rcases h with ⟨F, hFdiff, hF⟩
  have hδL : ∀ v, δL v = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, (0 : ℝ)) := by
    intro v
    have := congrArg (fun x => x - δL 0) (hF (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) v (0 : ℝ))
    simpa [hδL0] using this
  refine ⟨(0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), ?_⟩
  intro v
  have : δL v = δL 0 := by
    have hv := hF (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) v (0 : ℝ)
    have h0 := hF (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) (0 : ℝ)
    simpa using (by simpa using (congrArg (fun x => x) hv))
  simpa [hδL0] using this

classical
  rcases h with ⟨F, hFdiff, hF⟩
  -- define the candidate constant vector as the gradient in the r-direction at (0,0)
  let g : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) := (HasVarGradient.varGradient (n := n) F (0, (0 : ℝ)))
  refine ⟨g, ?_⟩
  intro v
  -- use the defining equation at r = 0, t = 0
  have hv : δL v = fderiv ℝ F ((0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), (0 : ℝ)) (v, (1 : ℝ)) := by
    simpa using (hF (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) v (0 : ℝ))
  -- decompose the derivative into t-part + r-part and eliminate the t-part using v = 0 and δL 0 = 0
  have h0 : δL (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) =
      fderiv ℝ F ((0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), (0 : ℝ)) (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by
    simpa using (hF (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) (0 : ℝ))
  have htime : fderiv ℝ F ((0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), (0 : ℝ)) (0, (1 : ℝ)) = 0 := by
    simpa [hδL0] using (h0.trans (by rfl))
  have hlin :
      fderiv ℝ F ((0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), (0 : ℝ)) (v, (1 : ℝ)) =
        fderiv ℝ F ((0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), (0 : ℝ)) (v, (0 : ℝ)) := by
    have := (fderiv_linear ℝ F ((0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), (0 : ℝ)))
    -- linearity in the second argument:
    -- (v,1) = (v,0) + (0,1)
    have hadd :
        fderiv ℝ F ((0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), (0 : ℝ)) (v, (1 : ℝ)) =
          fderiv ℝ F ((0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), (0 : ℝ)) (v, (0 : ℝ)) +
          fderiv ℝ F ((0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), (0 : ℝ)) (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by
      simpa [Prod.snd_add, Prod.fst_add, add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm] using
        (map_add (fderiv ℝ F ((0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), (0 : ℝ))) (v, (0 : ℝ)) (0, (1 : ℝ))).symm
    simpa [htime] using (by
      -- rewrite (v,1) as (v,0)+(0,1)
      have : (v, (1 : ℝ)) = (v, (0 : ℝ)) + (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by
        ext <;> simp
      -- use that to rewrite via additivity
      simpa [this] using hadd)
  -- identify the r-part with the gradient inner product
  have hgrad :
      fderiv ℝ F ((0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), (0 : ℝ)) (v, (0 : ℝ)) = ⟪g, v⟫_ℝ := by
    simpa [g] using (HasVarGradient.fderiv_eq_inner_varGradient (n := n) F (0, (0 : ℝ)) v)
  -- combine
  calc
    δL v
        = fderiv ℝ F ((0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), (0 : ℝ)) (v, (1 : ℝ)) := hv
    _   = fderiv ℝ F ((0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), (0 : ℝ)) (v, (0 : ℝ)) := hlin
    _   = ⟪g, v⟫_ℝ := hgrad

classical
  obtain ⟨F, hFdiff, hEq⟩ := h
  refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
  intro v
  have : δL v = δL 0 := by
    have hv : (fun _ v _ => δL v) 0 v 0 = (fun _ v _ => δL v) 0 0 0 := by rfl
    simpa using congrArg (fun z => z) hv
  simpa [hδL0] using this

rcases h with ⟨F, hFdiff, hF⟩
  have hconst : ∀ (r₁ r₂ : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) (t : ℝ) (v : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)),

    intro r₁ r₂ t v
    have h1 : δL v = fderiv ℝ F (r₁, t) (v, 1) := by simpa [hF r₁ v t] using (hF r₁ v t).symm
    have h2 : δL v = fderiv ℝ F (r₂, t) (v, 1) := by simpa [hF r₂ v t] using (hF r₂ v t).symm
    have : fderiv ℝ F (r₁, t) (v, 1) = fderiv ℝ F (r₂, t) (v, 1) := by
      simpa [hF r₁ v t, hF r₂ v t] using congrArg id (by rfl : δL v = δL v)
    have hsub₁ : fderiv ℝ F (r₁, t) (v, 1) - fderiv ℝ F (r₁, t) (0, 1) =

      simpa [map_sub] using (by
        simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
          (by
            have := (fderiv ℝ F (r₁, t)).map_sub (v, 1) (0, 1)
            simpa using this))
    have hsub₂ : fderiv ℝ F (r₂, t) (v, 1) - fderiv ℝ F (r₂, t) (0, 1) =
        fderiv ℝ F (r₂, t) (v, 0) := by
      simpa [map_sub] using (by
        simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
          (by
            have := (fderiv ℝ F (r₂, t)).map_sub (v, 1) (0, 1)
            simpa using this))
    have h0 : fderiv ℝ F (r₁, t) (0, 1) = fderiv ℝ F (r₂, t) (0, 1) := by
      have := (congrArg (fun z => z) (by
        simpa [hF r₁ (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) t, hF r₂ (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) t] using
          congrArg id (by rfl : δL (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) = δL (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)))))
      simpa using this
    have hmain : fderiv ℝ F (r₁, t) (v, 0) = fderiv ℝ F (r₂, t) (v, 0) := by
      calc
        fderiv ℝ F (r₁, t) (v, 0)
            = fderiv ℝ F (r₁, t) (v, 1) - fderiv ℝ F (r₁, t) (0, 1) := by
                symm; simpa using hsub₁
        _ = fderiv ℝ F (r₂, t) (v, 1) - fderiv ℝ F (r₂, t) (0, 1) := by
              simpa [this, h0]
        _ = fderiv ℝ F (r₂, t) (v, 0) := by
              simpa using hsub₂
    exact hmain
  let g : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) := (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n))
  refine ⟨g, ?_⟩
  intro v
  have hvt : ∀ (r : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) (t : ℝ), δL v = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, 1) := by
    intro r t
    simpa [hF r v t] using (hF r v t).symm
  have h0 : ∀ (r : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) (t : ℝ), δL 0 = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (0, 1) := by
    intro r t
    simpa [hF r (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) t] using (hF r (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) t).symm
  have : δL v = δL 0 + fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0) := by
    have hv : δL v = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 1) := hvt 0 0
    have hzero : δL 0 = fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) := h0 0 0
    have : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 1) =
        fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) + fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (v, 0) := by
      have := (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)).map_add (0, 1) (v, 0)
      simpa [Prod.snd, Prod.fst, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using this.symm
    calc

  refine ⟨(InnerProductSpace.toDual ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n))).symm L, ?_⟩
  intro v
  have hinner : L v = ⟪(InnerProductSpace.toDual ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n))).symm L, v⟫_ℝ := by
    simpa using
      (InnerProductSpace.toDual_symm_apply_apply ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) L v).symm
  simpa [hL v] using (hinner.symm)

classical
  rcases h with ⟨F, hFdiff, hEq⟩
  have hEq0 : ∀ r t, fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (0, 1) = 0 := by
    intro r t
    have := congrArg (fun z => z) (hEq r (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) t)
    -- δL 0 = 0 forces the time-derivative part to vanish
    simpa [hδL0] using (this.symm)
  have hEqv : ∀ r v t, δL v = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, 0) := by
    intro r v t
    have h1 := hEq r v t
    have h0 := hEq r (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) t
    -- use linearity in the direction argument
    have hlin :
        fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, 1) = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, 0) + fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (0, 1) := by
      simpa [Prod.smul_mk, add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm] using
        (map_add (fderiv ℝ F (r, t)) (v, 0) (0, 1))
    have hlin' :
        fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, 0) = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, 1) - fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (0, 1) := by
      linarith
    -- substitute and simplify with δL 0 = 0
    have : δL v = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, 1) - fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (0, 1) := by
      simpa [hEq r v t, hEq r (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) t, hδL0] using rfl
    -- now use hEq0 to remove the second term and rewrite (v,0)
    calc
      δL v = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, 1) - fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (0, 1) := this
      _ = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, 1) := by simp [hEq0 r t]
      _ = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, 0) + fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (0, 1) := by simpa using (hlin.symm)
      _ = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, 0) := by simp [hEq0 r t]
  -- show the derivative in spatial direction is independent of r,t
  have hspat_const :
      ∀ r₁ r₂ t₁ t₂ v, fderiv ℝ F (r₁, t₁) (v, 0) = fderiv ℝ F (r₂, t₂) (v, 0) := by
    intro r₁ r₂ t₁ t₂ v
    have hA := (hEqv r₁ v t₁)
    have hB := (hEqv r₂ v t₂)
    simpa [hA, hB]
  -- define g using Riesz representation at some basepoint
  let g : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) :=
    (toDual ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n))).symm
      (fun v => fderiv ℝ F ((0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), (0 : ℝ)) (v, 0))
  refine ⟨g, ?_⟩
  intro v
  -- reduce to the basepoint and use Riesz
  have hbase : δL v = fderiv ℝ F ((0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), (0 : ℝ)) (v, 0) := by
    simpa [hEqv] using (hEqv (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) v (0 : ℝ))
  -- identify with inner product via toDual
  have hinner :
      fderiv ℝ F ((0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), (0 : ℝ)) (v, 0) = ⟪g, v⟫_ℝ := by
    simp [g, InnerProductSpace.toDual_symm_apply, InnerProductSpace.toDual_apply]
  simpa [hbase, hinner]

classical
  rcases h with ⟨F, hFdiff, hF⟩
  -- use the restriction to the line `r = 0`, `t = 0` to get linearity in `v`
  let φ : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) → ℝ := fun v => fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, 0)
  have hφ : ∀ v, δL v = φ v := by
    intro v
    have h1 : δL v = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, 1) := by simpa using hF 0 v 0
    have h0 : δL 0 = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by simpa using hF 0 0 0
    have hLin : fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, 1)
        = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, 0) + fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by
      simpa [map_add, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
        (map_add (fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ))) (v, 0) (0, (1 : ℝ)))
    have : δL v = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, 0) + δL 0 := by
      calc
        δL v
            = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, 1) := h1
        _ = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, 0) + fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (0, (1 : ℝ)) := hLin
        _ = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, 0) + δL 0 := by simpa [h0]
    simpa [φ, hδL0] using this
  -- `φ` is linear as a directional derivative; represent it by an inner product.
  let L : (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) →ₗ[ℝ] ℝ :=
    (fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ))).comp (LinearMap.inl ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) ℝ)
  have hL : ∀ v, φ v = L v := by
    intro v
    simp [φ, L]
  obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := LinearMap.exists_inner_eq_smul_left L
  refine ⟨g, ?_⟩
  intro v
  have : δL v = L v := by simpa [hL] using (hφ v)
  simpa [hg] using this

classical
  rcases h with ⟨F, hFdiff, hEq⟩
  -- Take the derivative at (0,0) and use the defining equation.
  let g : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) := (fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ))).1
  refine ⟨g, ?_⟩
  intro v
  have hv : δL v = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, (1 : ℝ)) := by
    simpa using (hEq (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) v (0 : ℝ))
  have h0 : δL 0 = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by
    simpa using (hEq (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) (0 : ℝ))
  have ht : fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (0, (1 : ℝ)) = 0 := by
    simpa [hδL0] using (h0.symm)
  -- Linearity in the second argument gives: D(v,1) = D(v,0) + D(0,1) = D(v,0).
  have hsplit :
      fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, (1 : ℝ)) = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, (0 : ℝ)) := by
    have hadd :
        fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, (1 : ℝ)) =
          fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, (0 : ℝ)) +
            fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by
      -- (v,1) = (v,0) + (0,1)
      simpa [Prod.ext_iff, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
        (map_add (fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ))) (v, (0 : ℝ)) (0, (1 : ℝ))).symm
    -- use ht to remove the time-part
    simpa [ht] using hadd
  -- Now D(v,0) depends only on the first component and equals ⟪g,v⟫.
  have hinner : fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, (0 : ℝ)) = ⟪g, v⟫_ℝ := by
    -- In the product Euclidean space, the derivative splits into components.
    -- Here we defined g as the first component of the derivative at (0,0).
    simpa [g] using (by
      -- expand the action on (v,0)
      rfl : fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, (0 : ℝ)) = ⟪(fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ))).1, v⟫_ℝ)
  calc
    δL v
        = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, (1 : ℝ)) := hv
    _   = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, (0 : ℝ)) := hsplit
    _   = ⟪g, v⟫_ℝ := hinner

classical
  rcases h with ⟨F, hFdiff, hF⟩
  let φ : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) × ℝ → ℝ := fun x => F x - F (0, x.2)
  have hφdiff : Differentiable ℝ φ := by
    have h1 : Differentiable ℝ (fun x : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) × ℝ => F x) := hFdiff
    have h2 : Differentiable ℝ (fun x : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) × ℝ => F (0, x.2)) :=
      (hFdiff.comp (by
        simpa using (differentiable_const.prod_mk (differentiable_snd : Differentiable ℝ (fun x : _ => x.2)))))
    simpa [φ] using h1.sub h2
  have hφ :
      ∀ r v t, δL v = fderiv ℝ φ (r, t) (v, 1) := by
    intro r v t
    have := hF r v t
    have hsub : fderiv ℝ φ (r, t) (v, 1) =
        fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, 1) - fderiv ℝ (fun x : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) × ℝ => F (0, x.2)) (r, t) (v, 1) := by
      have hD1 : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun x : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) × ℝ => F x) (r, t) :=
        hFdiff.differentiableAt
      have hD2 : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun x : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) × ℝ => F (0, x.2)) (r, t) :=
        (hFdiff.comp (by
          simpa using (differentiable_const.prod_mk (differentiable_snd : Differentiable ℝ (fun x : _ => x.2))))).differentiableAt
      simpa [φ] using (fderiv_sub (x := (r, t)) hD1 hD2) (v, 1)
    have h0 : δL 0 = fderiv ℝ F (0, t) (0, 1) := by
      simpa using (hF 0 0 t)
    have hconst : fderiv ℝ (fun x : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) × ℝ => F (0, x.2)) (r, t) (v, 1) =
        fderiv ℝ F (0, t) (0, 1) := by
      have hlin :
          fderiv ℝ (fun x : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) × ℝ => (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n), x.2)) (r, t) (v, 1) =
            (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) × ℝ) + (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by
        simpa using (fderiv_const_prod_mk (x := (r, t)) (v := (v, 1)) (f := fun x : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) × ℝ => x.2))
      have hcomp :
          fderiv ℝ (fun x : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) × ℝ => F (0, x.2)) (r, t) (v, 1) =
            fderiv ℝ F (0, t) (0, 1) := by
        have hDg : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun x : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) × ℝ => (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n), x.2)) (r, t) := by
          simpa using (differentiable_const.prod_mk (differentiable_snd : Differentiable ℝ (fun x : _ => x.2))).differentiableAt
        have hDf : DifferentiableAt ℝ F (0, t) := hFdiff.differentiableAt
        simpa using (fderiv.comp (x := (r, t)) (f := F) (g := fun x : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) × ℝ => (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n), x.2))
          hDf hDg) (v, 1)
      simpa using hcomp
    have hz : fderiv ℝ F (0, t) (0, 1) = 0 := by
      have : δL 0 = fderiv ℝ F (0, t) (0, 1) := by simpa using (hF 0 0 t)
      simpa [hδL0] using this.symm
    have : δL v = fderiv ℝ φ (r, t) (v, 1) := by
      have := hF r v t
      -- rewrite with subtraction of the time-only part
      have : δL v = fderiv ℝ F (r, t) (v, 1) - fderiv ℝ (fun x : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) × ℝ => F (0, x.2)) (r, t) (v, 1) := by
        simpa [hconst, hz] using congrArg (fun z => z - fderiv ℝ (fun x : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) × ℝ => F (0, x.2)) (r, t) (v, 1)) (hF r v t)
      simpa [hsub] using this
    simpa using this
  have hφ0 : ∀ t, φ (0, t) = 0 := by
    intro t; simp [φ]
  have hφ_time : ∀ t, fderiv ℝ φ (0, t) (0, 1) = 0 := by
    intro t
    have : δL 0 = fderiv ℝ φ (0, t) (0, 1) := by
      simpa using (hφ 0 0 t)
    simpa [hδL0] using this
  have hφ_v :
      ∀ (r v : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) (t : ℝ),
        δL v = fderiv ℝ φ (r, t) (v, 0) := by
    intro r v t
    have hlin :
        fderiv ℝ φ (r, t) (v, 1) =
          fderiv ℝ φ (r, t) (v, 0) + fderiv ℝ φ (r, t) (0, 1) := by
      have hDf : DifferentiableAt ℝ φ (r, t) := hφdiff.differentiableAt
      -- linearity in direction
      simpa [Prod.snd_add, Prod.fst_add, add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm] using
        (map_add (fderiv ℝ φ (r, t)) (v, 0) (0, 1))
    have h0dir : fderiv ℝ φ (r, t) (0, 1) = fderiv ℝ φ (0, t) (0, 1) := by
      -- since δL 0 is independent of r
      have hr : δL 0 = fderiv ℝ φ (r, t) (0, 1) := by
        simpa using (hφ r 0 t)
      have h0 : δL 0 = fderiv ℝ φ (0, t) (0, 1) := by
        simpa using (hφ 0 0 t)
      exact by simpa [hr, h0]
    have hz : fderiv ℝ φ (r, t) (0, 1) = 0 := by
      simpa [h0dir] using hφ_time t
    have : δL v = fderiv ℝ φ (r, t) (v, 1) := by simpa using (hφ r v t)
    -- subtract the time part
    have : δL v = fderiv ℝ φ (r, t) (v, 0) := by
      simpa [hlin, hz] using this
    exact this
  let g : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) := (fderiv ℝ (fun r => φ (r, 0)) 0 : (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) →L[ℝ] ℝ)).adjoint 1
  refine ⟨g, ?_⟩
  intro v
  have hdir :
      δL v = fderiv ℝ φ (0, 0) (v, 0) := by
    simpa using (hφ_v 0 v 0)
  have hsplit :
      fderiv ℝ φ (0, 0) (v, 0) = fderiv ℝ (fun r => φ (r, 0)) 0 v := by
    -- fderiv in product along (v,0) equals partial in r
    have hDf : DifferentiableAt ℝ φ (0, (0 : ℝ)) := hφdiff.differentiableAt
    simpa using (fderiv_comp (x := (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n))) (f := fun r => φ (r, (0 : ℝ)))
      (g := fun r : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) => (r, (0 : ℝ)))
      (by
        have : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun r : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) => (r, (0 : ℝ))) 0 := by
          simpa using (differentiable_id.prod_mk differentiable_const).differentiableAt
        exact this) hDf) v
  -- identify with inner product via adjoint
  have : fderiv ℝ (fun r => φ (r, 0)) 0 v = ⟪g, v⟫_ℝ := by
    simp [g, ContinuousLinearMap.adjoint_inner_right]
  simpa [hdir, hsplit, this]

classical
  rcases h with ⟨F, hFdiff, hEq⟩
  -- Evaluate at r = 0, t = 0 to get a fixed continuous linear functional in v
  let L : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) →L[ℝ] ℝ :=
    (fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ))).comp
      (ContinuousLinearMap.inl ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) ℝ)
  have hL : ∀ v : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n), δL v = L v := by
    intro v
    have := hEq (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) v (0 : ℝ)
    -- split (v,1) into (v,0) + (0,1)
    have hadd :
        fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, (1 : ℝ)) =
          fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, (0 : ℝ)) +
          fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by
      simpa [Prod.ext_iff] using
        (map_add (fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ))) (v, (0 : ℝ)) (0, (1 : ℝ))).symm
    -- show the (0,1) term is 0 using δL 0 = 0
    have htime :
        fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (0, (1 : ℝ)) = 0 := by
      have h0 := hEq (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) (0 : ℝ)
      -- δL 0 = fderiv ... (0,1)
      simpa [hδL0] using h0
    -- and the (v,0) term is exactly L v
    have hspace :
        fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, (0 : ℝ)) = L v := by
      rfl
    -- combine
    calc
      δL v
          = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, (1 : ℝ)) := by simpa using this.symm
      _ = fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (v, (0 : ℝ)) +
          fderiv ℝ F (0, (0 : ℝ)) (0, (1 : ℝ)) := by simpa [Prod.snd] using hadd
      _ = L v + 0 := by simpa [hspace, htime]
      _ = L v := by simp
  -- represent the functional as inner with some g
  rcases (ContinuousLinearMap.exists_eq_inner (𝕜 := ℝ) (E := EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) L) with
    ⟨g, hg⟩
  refine ⟨g, ?_⟩
  intro v
  specialize hL v
  simpa [hg] using hL

classical
  rcases h with ⟨F, hFdiff, hEq⟩
  let φ : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) → ℝ := fun v => fderiv ℝ (fun r => F (r, (0 : ℝ))) 0 v
  have hδL : ∀ v, δL v = φ v := by
    intro v
    have := hEq (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) v (0 : ℝ)
    simpa [φ] using this
  have hLinear : IsLinearMap ℝ φ := by
    simpa [φ] using (fderiv_isLinear (𝕜 := ℝ) (f := fun r => F (r, (0 : ℝ))) (x := (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n))))
  have hCont : Continuous φ := by
    simpa [LinearMap.continuous_iff] using (hLinear.mk' φ).continuous
  have hAdd : ∀ u v, φ (u + v) = φ u + φ v := by
    intro u v
    simpa using (hLinear.map_add u v)
  have hSMul : ∀ (a : ℝ) v, φ (a • v) = a * φ v := by
    intro a v
    simpa [mul_comm, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm] using (hLinear.map_smulₛₗ (σ := (RingHom.id ℝ)) a v)
  have h0 : φ 0 = 0 := by
    simpa using (hLinear.map_zero)
  have hδL0' : δL 0 = φ 0 := by simpa [hδL] using (hδL0.trans (by rfl))
  have hφ0 : φ 0 = 0 := h0
  have : ∃ g : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n), ∀ v, φ v = ⟪g, v⟫_ℝ := by
    refine ⟨(0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), ?_⟩
    intro v
    have : φ v = 0 := by
      have := congrArg (fun t => φ (t • v)) (by rfl : (0 : ℝ) = 0)
      simpa [hSMul, hφ0] using this
    simpa [this]
  rcases this with ⟨g, hg⟩
  refine ⟨g, ?_⟩
  intro v
  simpa [hδL, hg] using (rfl : φ v = φ v)
